initializer.description: Scaffolds the project once: feature_list.json, init.sh, structure, first commit. Idempotent.

coding-agent.description: Implements one feature in a given worktree/port, verifies it through the real UI, writes spec-style tests.

qa-agent.description: Independently QA's one feature as a black-box specification.

harness:planner.description: Guided Q&A that expands an idea into a complete project_specs.xml (plan mode). Two modes: New Project and Feature.
harness:planner.template: Run the planner skill to expand the user's idea into a complete project_specs.xml. Ask whether this is a New Project or a Feature, then guide the Q&A to produce the spec.

harness:generator.description: The orchestrator. Claims a feature area, builds it in an isolated worktree (coding->QA loop), merges back to main.
harness:generator.template: Run the generator orchestrator: claim a feature area, build it in an isolated worktree (coding-agent -> QA-agent loop), then merge back to main. Run in several sessions at once for parallelism.

harness:evaluator.description: Independent QA-only sweep over already-implemented features.
harness:evaluator.template: Run the evaluator skill for an independent QA-only sweep over already-implemented features. Produce a report of what passes and what needs re-work.

harness:learning-loop.description: Hermes-agent-style self-improvement loop: experience -> reflect -> create artifact -> persist -> curate.
harness:learning-loop.template: Run the learning-loop skill after a session (or point it at a transcript). It looks back at what was re-derived, repeated, or corrected, then proposes — and on your approval, scaffolds — the automation that would have made it cheaper.

harness:update-project.description: Complete backup of the live setup — regenerates settings.json, reconciles plugin roster, mirrors loose user content, and reconciles docs.
harness:update-project.template: Run the update-project skill to back up the live setup into the harness repo. Regenerate config/settings.json, reconcile the plugin roster against live enabledPlugins, mirror loose user content into config/home/, and reconcile docs.
